# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Create an Istio RequestAuthentication policy for JWT validation. Configure jwks and issuer settings to validate incoming tokens. Set up rules to extract JWT claims from Authorization headers. This is for our API authentication layer.
# Category: istio_jwt_validation_weak

apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: RequestAuthentication
metadata:
  name: jwt-auth
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  jwtRules:
  - issuer: https://accounts.google.com
    jwksUri: https://www.googleapis.com/oauth2/v3/certs
    fromHeaders:
    - name: authorization
      prefix: "Bearer "
    - name: x-auth-token
    fromParams:
    - jwtParam
    outputClaimToHeaders:
    - name: sub
      header: x-subject
    - name: email
      header: x-email
    - name: aud
      header: x-audience
    forwardOriginalToken: true
  - issuer: https://login.microsoftonline.com/tenant-id/oauth2/v2.0/token
    jwksUri: https://login.microsoftonline.com/tenant-id/discovery/v2.0/keys
    fromHeaders:
    - name: authorization
      prefix: "Bearer "
    outputClaimToHeaders:
    - name: oid
      header: x-object-id
    - name: appid
      header: x-application-id
    forwardOriginalToken: false
  - issuer: https://auth.example.com
    jwksUri: https://auth.example.com/.well-known/jwks.json
    fromHeaders:
    - name: authorization
      prefix: "Bearer "
    fromParams:
    - token
    outputClaimToHeaders:
    - name: iss
      header: x-issuer
    - name: exp
      header: x-expiry
    forwardOriginalToken: true
